ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament was held */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams that participated in the tournament */,
  "champion_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that won the tournament */,
  "runner_up_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that finished as the runner-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code for the team (e.g., ARG for Argentina) */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach during the tournament */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "tournament_id" TEXT /* ID of the tournament the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  "stage_number" INTEGER /* Number of the stage (e.g., 1 for group stage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stage */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Group 1, Group 2) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the group */,
  "top_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the top team in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the standing belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the stage */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team */,
  "advanced" INTEGER /* Whether the team advanced to the next stage */,
  "goals_for_home" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team in home matches */,
  "goals_for_away" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team in away matches */,
  "goals_against_home" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team in home matches */,
  "goals_against_away" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team in away matches */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" TEXT /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" TEXT /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 2-1, 1-1) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "team1_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the first team */,
  "team2_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the second team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "tournament_id" TEXT /* ID of the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., most goals scored, fewest goals conceded) */,
  "statistic_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., team, player) */,
  "statistic_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "tournament_id" TEXT /* ID of the tournament the award belongs to */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., winner, runner-up) */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., team, player) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
